input_text: The stone was red. Muggles cannot disappear. Sandra moved to the kitchen. John is a nice man. Tallinn is in Estonia. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. John has an apple. Mary went to the bathroom. Mike is a nice man. Greg is a bad man. Gertrude is a wolf. The teacher showed a map to the students. The tree was cut by the farmer. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. Mike has a pear. The book was read by Sara. The picture was painted by Leo. The bike is small. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. An elephant was strong. Which nice man has an apple and a pear?
